title: Chanko Air
description:
Airships, Dungeons and Weapons hell yea!

A Fabric 1.20.1 adventure & magic modpack built around airships, dungeons, and performance-friendly exploration — combining Valkyrien Skies, Botania, Bewitchment, and YUNG’s world-expanding structures for limitless
body:
Fly. Fight. Explore. A Fabric 1.20.1 modpack for builders, mages & sky captains.Valkyrien Skies 2 + Eureka + Valkyrien Sails / Pirates / Relogs
Build real-physics airships and vessels — helm, anchor, and take your floating base across the world.

### Immersive Aircraft + Ship in a Bottle
Vanilla-friendly aircraft and deployable airships for cinematic exploration.

### The Aether & Twilight Forest
Classic and sky-dimension adventures packed with dungeons, loot, and bosses.

### When Dungeons Arise + YUNG’s Better Series + Awesome Dungeons + Dungeons and Taverns
Massive handcrafted structures, mines, temples, and fortresses to conquer.

### Bosses of Mass Destruction + Ultimate Bosses + Battle Towers
End-game boss fights with unique arenas, mechanics, and rare loot.

![Create and customize your own ships and airships](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/feaf4f6d900046c90af985e5442b4459356ddaa1.jpeg)

![With new Dimensions and Structures!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1b848e568518c61c81b442829131ed134cbf9e4.jpeg)

![The Twilight Forest is back](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0f0535319e50f75b4646119e8cb796d1d7fcbe7.jpeg)

![Just take what you like, even if it's not your property.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ffa07852ffce6214338a080a55023b6c3b47b9e.jpeg)
⸻

## 🔮 Magic & Progression

### Botania (+ Botania Combat)
Nature-tech magic powered by Mana — automation, gadgets, and gear progression.

### Malum • Hex Casting • Bewitchment
Dark rituals, programmable spell patterns, and classic witchcraft systems.

### Spell Engine + Spell Power Attributes + Battlemages
Deep, combat-oriented magic with scaling attributes and new spell types.

### Runes • Dragonsteel & Star Alloy • Elemental Metals
Advanced metallurgy and mystical crafting to empower your late-game tools.

### Accessories / Trinkets / Heart Canisters
RPG-style equipment slots, rings, amulets, and health upgrades.

![The Aether is back too ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66bc3bd58b532d1842be81436ef38223e9d7fd21.jpeg)

⸻

## 🏰 Building & Atmosphere

### Macaw’s Collection (Bridges, Roofs, Doors, Furniture, Lights, etc.)
A full creative toolkit for architecture and decoration.

### Handcrafted • Decorative Blocks • Supplementaries • Storage Drawers
Detailed interiors and modular building blocks.

### Oh The Biomes We’ve Gone + Biomes O’ Plenty + BetterEnd + BetterNether
Vibrant world generation across every dimension.

### Farmer’s Delight (+ Refabricated + Expansions)
Expanded cooking, crops, and campfire meals to make survival cozy.

### Presence Footsteps + Fresh Animations (+ Extensions + Moves)
Dynamic soundscapes and expressive player motion.

### Dramatic Skys + Nuit (Fabric Skyboxes)
Cinematic lighting and atmospheric skies.

![The good old Battle towers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03e0d7667d07b09925730b8e8a0d82502642cc00.jpeg)

![With a beautiful landscape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c134e1230ba6662568de44381cfa8dbddaf1cca.jpeg)

![With Better Nether & Better End](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/baf1af6353f30ffa0f2ab1997a39b74634e0768a.jpeg)
⸻

## ⚡ Performance & Quality of Life

### Sodium (+ Extra + Reese’s Options) • Lithium • Starlight
• Entity Culling • FerriteCore • Memory Leak Fix • Clumps
• Dynamic FPS • Bobby • Continuity • Indium
• Debugify • Bad Optimizations • Very Many Players • spark
Full suite of client + server optimization for high-FPS gameplay and large worlds.

### Quality of Life Mods:
Just Enough Items, Waystones, Mouse Tweaks, AppleSkin, BetterF3, Chat Heads, Simple Voice Chat, Traveler’s Backpack, Enchantment Descriptions, Advancement Plaques.
